things.comment: Define for spec compatibility. An action (retrieveAllThings) should be used instead.

thingUpdated.title: Thing Updated
thingUpdated.description: A Thing TD was updated in the directory

data.title: TD
data.description: JSON encoded TD of the Thing

thingDeleted.title: Thing Deleted
thingDeleted.description: A Thing TD was removed from the directory

data.title: Thing ID
data.description: ID of the Thing that was deleted

createThing.title: Create Thing TD
createThing.description: Update the Thing TD in the directory. For use by Thing agents only.

input.title: TD JSON
input.description: Device TD document in JSON format
input.comment: The spec defines type object but there is no scheme associated with it.

deleteThing.title: Delete Thing
deleteThing.description: Remove a TD from the directory

retrieveAllThings.title: Read all TDs
retrieveAllThings.description: Read a batch of TD documents

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Start index in the list of TD documents

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of documents to return

output.title: TD list
output.description: List of JSON encoded TD documents

retrieveThing.title: Retrieve a TD
retrieveThing.description: Return a JSON encoded TD document

input.title: Thing ID
input.description: Thing ID of the Thing to read

output.title: TD
output.description: A JSON encoded Thing Description Document

updateThing.title: Update Thing TD
updateThing.description: Update the Thing TD in the directory. For use by agents only.
updateThing.comment: Only agents can update their TD

input.title: TD
input.description: Device TD document in JSON format
input.comment: The spec defines type object but there is no scheme associated with it.
